Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Wow, high school is amazing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}They said it's fine for us to use the schoolyard for a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Normally, you wouldn't be allowed in here, understand?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So don't touch anything you're not supposed to, and if something happens, let us know immediately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Good. Then practice until the big hand on that clock reaches twelve. And don't go inside the school building![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You need to pump your arms more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And don't lift your legs so high, or you might pull a muscle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Go on, give it a try! You just gotta believe in yourself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}...Hey, big sis! You should be our coach![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Aw, I'm a real sucker when kids look at me that way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But I've never tried coaching before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, what do you think I should do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Well, it isn't a decision to make lightly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}But I'm not gonna go easy on you guys! And no one's allowed to quit halfway, either![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1003}Hey, is he gonna teach us, too? Is he your boyfriend, Coach?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Now, everyone, line up! I said I wouldn't go easy on you, didn't I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko began passionately[n]instructing each child.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Think positive! If you think you're gonna lose, you will! Don't be afraid of them just because they're sixth graders![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}That sounds hard... But okay![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watched Yuko as she coached the kids.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eventually, they all went home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Once they started calling me Coach, I couldn't resist.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I was wondering. Would you maybe want to do this coaching thing together? I know I'm asking a lot, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I don't know much about racing. And plus, you're really athletic, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}So if you'd coach them with me, I'd... really appreciate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I mean, why not, right? Please? Honestly, I don't think I can handle it on my own...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I'm sure those kids will be happy too! Thanks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I mean, when they ask like that, don't you just want to help them? Come on, pretty please?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Yuko is counting on me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I know that I keep asking you for favors, but I'll make it up to you one day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I left school with Yuko and[n]returned to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
